title: ROPE validation suite
description: A flat list of self-contained checks. Each check is just {id, kind, ...whatever fields that kind needs}. Kinds don't share field names, time representation, or output shape with each other — each kind maps to exactly one function in rope-dev-tools, and that function's own schema (resolved via check_kinds.json) validates everything on the check object besides id/kind. Validate this against the whole document's top-level fields; validate each checks[i]'s remaining fields separately against the matching schemas/checks/<kind>.schema.json, resolved via check_kinds.json — same two-stage pattern used for model_manifest.json (see manifest-envelope.schema.json), just without any shared shape assumed for what's inside.

kind.description: Must appear in check_kinds.json, which resolves it to a schema validating every other field on this check object. Not enforceable by this schema — see tests/validation_suite_test.py.

schema_version.description: Tracks the JSON shape of this document.

content_version.description: A separate, human-bumped counter tracking the suite's content (checks), incremented whenever content changes even though schema_version stays put. Only meaningful for comparison between two suite documents sharing the same schema_version. This is the value a manifest's validation.suite_content_version is compared against to detect staleness.
